# Kovai Connect - Coimbatore Business Directory

Coimbatore's definitive multi-service business directory connecting Kovai's finest industries, software firms, healthcare facilities, manufacturing plants, educational institutions, and retail outlets.

## Core Navigation
- [Home Page](/index.html): Browse industries by category, search verified local business profiles, view interactive map of Coimbatore.
- [About Us](/about.html): Learn about our mission to digitize and index the industrial hub of Coimbatore.
- [Contact Us](/contact.html): Connect with support or visit our central offices.
- [Register Business](/register.html): Add your company profile to Coimbatore's directory.

## Industrial Directories
- [Textiles & Mills](/textiles.html): Coimbatore's heritage textile sector, cotton exporters, spinning mills.
- [IT & Software](/it.html): Software development hubs, SaaS startups, tech parks in Saravanampatti and Avinashi Road.
- [Healthcare](/healthcare.html): Multi-specialty hospitals, eye clinics, and healthcare institutions.
- [Manufacturing](/manufacturing.html): CNC machine makers, agricultural and domestic pumps, automotive components.
- [Education](/education.html): Top engineering colleges, deemed universities, and arts colleges.
- [Retail & Lifestyle](/retail.html): Silk saree showrooms, jewellery retailers, shopping centers.

## Contact Information
- **Phone**: +91 98402 79047
